#!/bin/bash
# Deploy script with health check

set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="myapp"
DEPLOY_DIR="/opt/$APP_NAME"

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME..."

if [ ! -d "$DEPLOY_DIR" ]; then
    echo "Creating deploy directory"
    mkdir -p "$DEPLOY_DIR"
fi

for file in dist/*; do
    cp "$file" "$DEPLOY_DIR/"
done

echo "Deploy complete!"

# Kubernetes deployment config
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: myapp:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
